scenarios.title: LLM Fine-Tuning, Training, and Serving Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Transformers model usage, local generation, fine-tuning, serving CLIs, PEFT adapters, LlamaFactory/Axolotl/ms-swift training, vLLM/SGLang/LMDeploy serving, BentoML model services, and LLM deployment.
scenarios.role: Use BentoML to author model-serving Services, build and containerize Bentos, run HTTP/gRPC servers and clients, manage models, operate the CLI and BentoCloud, and configure observability or production runtime behavior.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `bentoml` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: cli and cloud, model management, observability and operations, packaging and containerization, service authoring, and serving and clients.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `bentoml` when the request names `bentoml`, centers on Use BentoML to author model-serving Services, build and containerize Bentos, run HTTP/gRPC servers and clients, manage models, operate the CLI and BentoCloud, and configure observability or production runtime behavior. Use when tasks mention BentoML, bentoml service.py, bentofile.yaml, Bento build/serve/deploy, BentoCloud, or BentoML model stores, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in llm finetuning training serving workflows. Then route to CLI and cloud, model management, observability and operations, or packaging and containerization when those focused workflows match.
